MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th April, 1992 G.S.R. 444(E) :—Whereas the Central Government is satisfied on the basis of evidence and other material available before it that the usu of tobacco in toolh pastes]tooth powders is likely to involve risk lo human beings and that h is neces- sary and expedient in the public interest so to do : Now, therefore in exercise of powers conferred by section 26-A of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act. 1940 (23 of 1940). the Central Government hereby-t prohibit the manufacture and sale of all cosmetics licensed as Toolh Pasiesj tooth powders containing tobacco.
